faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my North Merrick home?
faqs.answer: Signs of carpenter ants include piles of sawdust-like material near wooden structures, rustling sounds inside walls, and seeing large black or reddish-black ants, especially in spring. You may also notice winged ants indoors, which indicate an established colony. Our North Merrick inspectors can identify carpenter ant activity and locate nests within your home's structure.

faqs.question: What does carpenter ant control cost in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control services in North Merrick typically range from $350 to $2,000 depending on the extent of the infestation, colony locations, and the size of your property. Minor infestations caught early may cost $350-$600, while severe cases requiring multiple treatments and wall void applications can reach $1,500-$2,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat carpenter ants in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for North Merrick residents in most cases. Initial treatments typically take 1-3 hours depending on your home's size and infestation severity. While you'll see reduced ant activity within 48-72 hours, complete colony elimination usually takes 2-4 weeks as foraging ants carry treatment back to nests.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ant treatments safe for my family and pets in North Merrick?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our certified technicians.
